nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Viridian dacnis
nodes.summary: The viridian dacnis (Dacnis viguieri) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Panama. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The viridian dacnis (Dacnis viguieri) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Panama.

nodes.name: 巴拿马
